brief_summary: Five cards across the size ladder. Q1 (75%) is electric-blue-filled and emphasized as the headline SKU with the HE 8K Marble variant labelled ~$230 and 'reviewer-first'. Q2 (65%), Q3 (TKL), Q5 (96%), and Q6 (full-size) each in warm-grey outline cards. Below, a blue platform bar reads: 'all five run ZMK · 8K polling · up to 660h battery (Keychron claim)'.
data_sources: keychron-q-ultra-zmk.mdx § 'What's in the line' — 'The Q Ultra series mirrors the existing Q-line size ladder: Q1 (75%), Q2 (65%), Q3 (TKL), Q5 (96%), and Q6 (full-size) ... The Q1 HE 8K Marble is the headline SKU ... Approximate pricing for the Q1 HE 8K has been quoted around the $230 mark in early coverage'
keychron-q-ultra-zmk.mdx § lede — '8K polling-rate ceiling ... up to 660 hours per charge'
